title: Zara India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Zara India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Zara India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zara India Digital Technologies:
Zara India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
